/usr/bin/g++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cute_tutorial_sgemm_2.dir/link.d @CMakeFiles/cute_tutorial_sgemm_2.dir/objects1.rsp -o cute_tutorial_sgemm_2 @CMakeFiles/cute_tutorial_sgemm_2.dir/linkLibs.rsp -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
